description: Registry of supported inference engines and their patch capabilities provided by wings-accel.

ears.description: Enable entropy-adaptive rejection sampling for mtp, eagle3, and suffix speculative decoding on Ascend and NVIDIA vLLM 0.17.0

sparse_kv.description: Enable sparse KV cache management with BMSA paged k-means clustering on vLLM 0.17.0

ears.description: Enable entropy-adaptive rejection sampling for mtp and suffix speculative decoding on vLLM 0.19.0
Enable entropy-adaptive rejection sampling for mtp, eagle3, and suffix speculative decoding on vllm-ascend 0.17.0rc1

draft_model.description: Enable functional draft_model speculative decoding for vllm-ascend on 0.17.0rc1 without a performance guarantee

ears.description: Enable entropy-adaptive rejection sampling for mtp, eagle3, and suffix speculative decoding on vllm-ascend 0.18.0rc1
